Magic doesn't fool you—it shows you wonder still exists.

Manifesto

The best magic doesn't deceive the eyes. It awakens the imagination.

David Maestro · Illusionist
About

From A Coruña to stages around the world.

I am David Maestro (A Coruña, 1997). I discovered magic at nine. By fourteen it became my professional career.

At eighteen I was chosen from thirteen young magicians to compete on Pura Magia, RTVE's first major magic talent show. I reached the final. Then came Hora Punta, several regional TV collaborations, and a finalist run on Spain's Got Talent.

For the past years I have been the resident magician of Virgin Voyages, performing in the main theatre of their luxury cruise ships to full audiences and standing ovations. Sir Richard Branson watched one of those shows and called it "one of the best shows I've ever seen".

My magic is defined by innocence, humour and connection with the audience. More than creating impossible moments, I make people laugh, take part, and feel like part of the trick from the very first minute.

— David Maestro

By the numbers

A magician measures his career in packed rooms.

  • 1000+ Live shows And counting
  • 40+ Nationalities From Caribbean to Asia
  • 15 Years as a pro Since he was 14
  • 2 National TV finals Pura Magia · Got Talent
The shows

Two ways to leave the room speechless.

Pick the format that fits your event. Both adapt to the venue, the language, and the tone. Neither of them involves rabbits.

01
02
01 / 02

Stage magic

A show built to fill a theatre.

A show designed for a stage. Grand illusions, moments of mentalism, dry humour, and a rhythm that breathes. Adapts to your venue's sound and lights, or arrives with its own rig.

  • Length 45–60 min Adjustable
  • Capacity Up to 800 Standard theatre
  • Rig Self-contained Or adapted
  • Languages ES · EN And silent
Ideal for
  • Theatres
  • Conferences
  • Corporate galas
  • Cruises

"A magician who respects the stage."

Book stage show →
02 / 02

Cocktail magic

Close-up magic, table by table.

Magic a hand's width from the audience. Perfect for private events, restaurants, weddings and celebrations where guests move freely. Short sets, table by table.

  • Length 5–10 min Per table
  • Capacity Up to 200 Ideal for small groups
  • Rig None Only my hands
  • Languages ES · EN On request
Ideal for
  • Weddings
  • Restaurants
  • Corporate cocktails
  • Private parties

"A hand's width from your face."

Book cocktail set →
The moment

A show that got its standing ovation at sea.

For seasons I have been the resident magician of Virgin Voyages, performing in the main theatre of their cruise ships to full houses. One night, Sir Richard Branson, founder of Virgin Group, walked in and sat down in the fourth row.

"One of the best shows I've ever seen."

Sir Richard Branson Founder of Virgin Group
Appearances on

Television, international cruise ships, theatres and brands that have called me over the years.

Praise

What they said when the trick ended.

Frequently asked

Before you write.

What people usually ask before booking. If your question isn't here, ping me on WhatsApp.

How long is a show?

Depends on the format. Stage shows run 45 to 60 minutes. Cocktail magic works in short sets of 5 to 10 minutes per table, across the length of the event (typically 1 to 3 hours). Both are adjustable.

Do you perform outside A Coruña?

Most of the time, yes. I live in A Coruña but the work takes me across Spain, Europe, Latin America and Virgin Voyages' international cruise routes. Travel is agreed upfront and included in the quote.

What languages do you perform in?

Spanish and Galician fluently, English at stage level. The stage show has passages that work without words, so it adapts well to mixed or international audiences.

What do you need from the venue?

Stage: basic sound, front lighting, and a 4×3 m minimum area. I can bring my own rig if the venue has none. Cocktail: nothing — just tables to walk up to.

How much does it cost?

Every event is different (audience size, length, travel, tech requirements). I typically send a quote within 24 hours of hearing the details. Get in touch and we'll talk.

What if the event has children?

I don't do children's magic. My show works with adult or mixed audiences from about 12 upwards. If the event is fully family with young kids, I'll point you to someone specialised.

Can you perform on TV / on camera?

Yes. I have experience working with camera crews and adapt the execution to the angles and pacing the shoot needs. Write with the project details.

Contact

Tell me about your event.

A direct message is the fastest route. Usually a reply within 24h.
